sentences.translation: Kompanija je kupila novi printer za kancelariju.
sentences.translationEn: The company bought a new printer for the office.

sentences.arabic: حَاوَلَ مُنِيرٌ أَنْ يُشَغِّلَهَا وَلَكِنَّهُ لَمْ يَعْرِفْ كَيْفَ.
sentences.translation: Munir je pokušao da je uključi ali nije znao kako.
sentences.translationEn: Munir tried to operate it but did not know how.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ زَمِيلَهُ الَّذِي قَرَأَ التَّعْلِيمَاتِ بِعِنَايَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Upitao je kolegu koji je pažljivo pročitao uputstva.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his colleague who read the instructions carefully.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ عَشْرِ دَقَائِقَ بَدَأَتِ الطَّابِعَةُ تَعْمَلُ.
sentences.translation: Nakon deset minuta printer je počeo raditi.
sentences.translationEn: After ten minutes the printer started working.
